meaning: n.苏格兰人,苏格兰语adj.苏格兰人的,苏格兰语的n.刻痕vt.镇压,粉碎,刻痕,使受伤
examples: Don poured a generous measure of scotch into a fresh glass.
She expected him to ask for a scotch and was rather nonplussed when he asked her to mix him a martini.
Which countries import most Scotch whiskey?
Try the George Burns, a cocktail made with two different kinds of scotch, plus grappa and bitters.
Chivas is the second biggest company in Scotch whisky, with 21% of the market.
